scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=@mymemory/shared && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=@mymemory/api" "npm run dev --workspace=@mymemory/web"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace=@mymemory/shared && npm run dev --workspace=@mymemory/api
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@mymemory/shared && npm run build --workspace=@mymemory/api && npm run build --workspace=@mymemory/web
